version_description: This specific tab is based off the studio recorded version.
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
 (I want you to stay)[/tab]


[Verse 1]
[tab]              [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]
I want you to stay[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Em7[/ch]
'Til I'm in the grave[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Am7[/ch]
'Til I rot away, dead and buried[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]Dsus4[/ch]
'Til I'm in the casket you carry[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]
If you go, I'm goin' too, uh[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]Em7[/ch]
'Cause it was always you (Alright)[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]Am7[/ch]
And if I'm turnin' blue, please don't save me[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]D[/ch]               [ch]Dsus4[/ch]
Nothin' left to lose without my baby[/tab]


[Refrain]
[tab][ch]Gmaj7[/ch]                                                    [ch]Em7[/ch]
 Birds of a feather, we should stick together, I know[/tab]

I said I'd never think I wasn't better alone
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]
  Can't change the weather, might not be forever[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Dsus4[/ch]
But if it's forever, it's even better[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                 [ch]Em7[/ch]
 And I don't know what I'm cryin' for[/tab]
[tab]                               [ch]Am7[/ch]
I don't think I could love you more[/tab]
[tab]                                 [ch]Dsus4[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
It might not be long, but, baby, I[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]                                  [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]
I'll love you 'til the day that I die[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Em7[/ch]
'Til the day that I die[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]Am7[/ch]
'Til the light leaves my eyes[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Dsus4[/ch]
'Til the day that I die[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab]              [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]
I want you to see, hmm[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Em7[/ch]
How you look to me, hmm[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Am7[/ch]
You wouldn't believe if I told ya[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]Dsus4[/ch]        [ch]D7[/ch]
You would keep the compliments I throw ya[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]
But you're so full of shit, uh[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Em7[/ch]
Tell me it's a bit, oh[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Am7[/ch]
Say you don't see it, your mind's polluted[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Dsus4[/ch]               [ch]D7[/ch]
Say you wanna quit, don't be stupid[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]Gmaj7[/ch]                                 [ch]Em7[/ch]
 And I don't know what I'm cryin' for[/tab]
[tab]                               [ch]Am7[/ch]
I don't think I could love you more[/tab]
[tab]                              [ch]Dsus4[/ch]     [ch]D7[/ch]
Might not be long, but, baby, I[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]
Don't wanna say goodbye[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                                                          [ch]Em7[/ch]
Birds of a feather, we should stick together, I know ('Til the day that I die)[/tab]
[tab]                                                                       [ch]Am7[/ch]
I said I'd never think I wasn't better alone ('Til the light leaves my eyes)[/tab]
[tab]                                                                    [ch]D[/ch]
Can't change the weather, might not be forever ('Til the day that I die)[/tab]

But if it's forever, it's even better


[Post-Chorus]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                      [ch]Em7[/ch]
 I knew you in another life[/tab]
[tab]                               [ch]Am7[/ch]
You had that same look in your eyes[/tab]
[tab]                            [ch]D[/ch]
I love you, don't act so surprised[/tab]


[Outro]
[ch]G[/ch] [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]Am7[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]D7[/ch]
